# Load the JSON files
import json, re, unicodedata, math
from collections import defaultdict, Counter

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

# Peek at first few entries structure
quran[:2]

# Search simple substring in ayah_text for the provided snippet and possible corrections
target_full = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ"

matches = []
for rec in quran:
    if target_full in rec['ayah_text']:
        matches.append(rec)
matches[:5], len(matches)

# Search for ayah containing 'ولقد خلقنا الانسان'
sought1 = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ"
cands1 = [rec for rec in quran if sought1 in rec['ayah_text']]
cands1

cands_habl = [rec for rec in quran if "حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ" in rec['ayah_text']]
cands_habl

cands_wqiah = [rec for rec in quran if "وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ" in rec['ayah_text']]
cands_wqiah
[rec for rec in quran if "وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ" in rec['ayah_text']]

import regex

# Normalization helpers
AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN = regex.compile(r'[\p{Mn}\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # general mark & Arabic diacritics & dagger alif
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = r"""!"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~،؛؟«»"""

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not s:
        return s
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # unify alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا').replace('ٱ', 'ا')
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    # Remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN.sub('', s)
    # Remove punctuation
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in PUNCT)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = ' '.join(s.split())
    return s

full_sub = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ"
cand_qaf = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ"
cand_waqiah = "وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَـٰكِنْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ"

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute LCS length for tokens maybe; We'll do char-level after normalization
    A, B = a, b
    n, m = len(A), len(B)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if A[i-1] == B[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_lcs(a, b):
    # normalized LCS / max(len)
    L = lcs_length(a, b)
    return L / max(len(a), len(b))

Nfull = normalize_ar(full_sub)
Nqaf = normalize_ar(cand_qaf)
Nwaq = normalize_ar(cand_waqiah)
sim_qaf = similarity_lcs(Nfull, Nqaf)
sim_waq = similarity_lcs(Nfull, Nwaq)
sim_qaf, sim_waq

cand_both = cand_qaf + " " + cand_waqiah
Nboth = normalize_ar(cand_both)
sim_both = similarity_lcs(Nfull, Nboth)
sim_both

def token_f1(a, b):
    A = normalize_ar(a).split()
    B = normalize_ar(b).split()
    ca = Counter(A)
    cb = Counter(B)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if not A or not B:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / len(B)  # fraction of candidate tokens that are in full_sub? Actually F1: predicted B vs gold A
    recall = common / len(A)     # fraction of full_sub tokens captured
    if precision + recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, common, len(A), len(B)

token_f1(full_sub, cand_qaf), token_f1(full_sub, cand_waqiah), token_f1(full_sub, cand_both)

import difflib
ratio_qaf = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, Nfull, Nqaf).ratio()
ratio_both = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, Nfull, Nboth).ratio()
ratio_waq = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, Nfull, Nwaq).ratio()
ratio_qaf, ratio_both, ratio_waq
